INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: When a device is NAT, its other classifications may be inaccurate. Therefore, we put the NAT detection first.
INNER_RULE.NAME: NAT Devices

RULE.DESCRIPTION: to find windows manageable domain or secure connector manage and other. to show computers that can deep managed by forescout.
RULE.NAME: Windows Clarrification

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windows devices manageable domain (login pc domain)
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows Manage Domain

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windoes devices installed secure connector
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows Manage Secure Connector

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windows devices le domain but Not Manageable (login pc not domain) or Service WMI, RPC, SMB close and remote registry windows not running
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows Domain | but NOT Manageable

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windows devices le domain but Not Manageable (login pc not domain) or Service WMI, RPC, SMB close and remote registry windows not running
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows WORKGROUP

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windows devices with domain MSHOME
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows MSHOME

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windows devices with domain OPICMTR
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows OPICMTR

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windows devices with domain WINSVRVR0
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows WINSVRVR0

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windows devices with domain ADJ
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows ADJ

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windows devices with domain ID
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows ID

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windows devices with domain Any Value
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows Any Value

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: windows pc not manageable domain (not login domain) & not manageable secure conenctor (not installed agent)
INNER_RULE.NAME: Other

PARAM.NAME: guest_msg
PARAM.VALUE: Dear Guest, To connect to the network, complete the fields and select Request Access button.

PARAM.NAME: message
PARAM.VALUE: Dear User, Enter your Credentials, and log in to the network.

PARAM.NAME: blocking_rule
PARAM.VALUE: TO_-1548524325910511786#No Name Assigned#All IPv4@:BLOCK:PORT_Any:;FROM_-1548524325910511786#No Name Assigned#All IPv4@:BLOCK:PORT_Any:

PARAM.NAME: message
PARAM.VALUE:
Dear User,
Your computer should be checked for compliance with the corporate security policies. Click "Confirm" to start the compliance check.

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Antivirus is not installed.
INNER_RULE.NAME: AV Not Installed

PARAM.NAME: message
message
PARAM.VALUE:
Hello,
CounterACT has detected that the corporate antivirus is not installed on your computer.
Please contact the Helpdesk
Thank you, The IT team of Forescout
Details:
IP Address: {ip} MAC Address: {mac}

PARAM.NAME: subject
PARAM.VALUE: Antivirus is not installed on your machine - please contact the IT team

PARAM.NAME: message
PARAM.VALUE:
Corporate antivirus application is not installed on your machine.
Please contact the Helpdesk for instructions.

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Antivirus is not running.
INNER_RULE.NAME: AV Not Running

PARAM.NAME: message
message
PARAM.VALUE:

CounterACT has detected that the corporate antivirus is not running on your computer.
Please contact the Helpdesk
Thank you, The IT team of Forescout

PARAM.VALUE:

INNER_RULE.NAME: AV Not Updated

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Plugin Name:Security Policy Templates Display Name:VR EternalBlue Name:eternal_blue_vulnerability_breakdown Version:18.0.1 Comments:Automated Threats; IT; Enterprise Endpoints - DO NOT EDIT ABOVE THIS LINE -
INNER_RULE.NAME: Vulnerable

CONDITION.LABEL: CounterACT Script Result (Obsolete) Ignore failed script result:false, Command or Script:smb-vuln-ms17-010_py.sh

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Plugin Name:Security Policy Templates Display Name:VR EternalBlue Name:eternal_blue_vulnerability_breakdown Version:18.0.1 Comments:Automated Threats; IT; Enterprise Endpoints - DO NOT EDIT ABOVE THIS LINE -
INNER_RULE.NAME: Unable to detect

CONDITION.LABEL: CounterACT Script Result (Obsolete) Ignore failed script result:false, Command or Script:smb-vuln-ms17-010_py.sh

VALUE.VALUE2: Unable to detect if this host is vulnerable

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Plugin Name:Security Policy Templates Display Name:VR EternalBlue Name:eternal_blue_vulnerability_breakdown Version:18.0.1 Comments:Automated Threats; IT; Enterprise Endpoints - DO NOT EDIT ABOVE THIS LINE -
INNER_RULE.NAME: Exception

CONDITION.LABEL: CounterACT Script Result (Obsolete) Ignore failed script result:false, Command or Script:smb-vuln-ms17-010_py.sh

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Plugin Name:Security Policy Templates Display Name:VR EternalBlue Name:eternal_blue_vulnerability_breakdown Version:18.0.1 Comments:Automated Threats; IT; Enterprise Endpoints - DO NOT EDIT ABOVE THIS LINE -
INNER_RULE.NAME: SMBv1 Disabled

CONDITION.LABEL: CounterACT Script Result (Obsolete) Ignore failed script result:false, Command or Script:smb-vuln-ms17-010_py.sh

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Plugin Name:Security Policy Templates Display Name:VR EternalBlue Name:eternal_blue_vulnerability_breakdown Version:18.0.1 Comments:Automated Threats; IT; Enterprise Endpoints - DO NOT EDIT ABOVE THIS LINE -
INNER_RULE.NAME: Not vulnerable

CONDITION.LABEL: CounterACT Script Result (Obsolete) Ignore failed script result:false, Command or Script:smb-vuln-ms17-010_py.sh

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Plugin Name:Security Policy Templates Display Name:VR EternalBlue Name:eternal_blue_vulnerability_breakdown Version:18.0.1 Comments:Automated Threats; IT; Enterprise Endpoints - DO NOT EDIT ABOVE THIS LINE -
INNER_RULE.NAME: Others

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Plugin Name:Security Policy Templates Display Name:VR WannaCry Name:wanna_cyr_infected Version:18.0.7 Comments:Automated Threats; IT; Enterprise Endpoints - DO NOT EDIT ABOVE THIS LINE -
INNER_RULE.NAME: Vulnerability Not Assessed - Not Managed

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Plugin Name:Security Policy Templates Display Name:VR WannaCry Name:wanna_cyr_infected Version:18.0.7 Comments:Automated Threats; IT; Enterprise Endpoints - DO NOT EDIT ABOVE THIS LINE -
INNER_RULE.NAME: Infected

CONDITION.LABEL: Windows Registry Value Exists Registry Value Path:HKLM\SOFTWARE\WanaCrypt0r\wd
Windows Registry Value Exists Registry Value Path:HKCU\SOFTWARE\WanaCrypt0r\wd
Windows File Exists File Name (full path):%SystemRoot%\mssecsvc.exe
Windows File Exists File Name (full path):%SystemRoot%\tasksche.exe

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Plugin Name:Security Policy Templates Display Name:VR WannaCry Name:wanna_cyr_infected Version:18.0.7 Comments:Automated Threats; IT; Enterprise Endpoints - DO NOT EDIT ABOVE THIS LINE -
INNER_RULE.NAME: Not Infected

PARAM.NAME: message
message
PARAM.VALUE:
Dear Computer User,
Malicious activity was detected on your computer. Please verify that your antivirus is running and up to date. Please contact the Help Desk for further instructions.
The IT group

PARAM.NAME: guest_msg
PARAM.VALUE: Dear Guest, To connect to the network, complete the fields and select Request Access button.

PARAM.NAME: message
PARAM.VALUE: Dear User, Enter your Credentials, and log in to the network.

PARAM.NAME: blocking_rule
PARAM.VALUE: FROM_-1548524325910511786#No Name Assigned#All IPv4@:BLOCK:PORT_Any:;TO_-1548524325910511786#No Name Assigned#All IPv4@:BLOCK:PORT_Any:

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: When a device is NAT, its other classifications may be inaccurate. Therefore, we put the NAT detection first.
INNER_RULE.NAME: NAT Devices

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION:
Endpoints matching this sub-rule could not have either their Function, Operating System, or Vendor and Model determined due to conflicting profile matches.
Investigate the devices in this sub-rule and either manually classify them or build additional sub-rules to classify them based on patterns you observe. View the values Suggested Function and Suggested Operating System properties to discover the conflicting profile matches.
INNER_RULE.NAME: Multiple Profile Matches

RULE.DESCRIPTION: to find windows manageable domain or secure connector manage and other. to show computers that can deep managed by forescout.
RULE.NAME: Windows Classification - Dev

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windows devices manageable domain (login pc domain)
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows Manage Domain

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windoes devices installed secure connector
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows Manage Secure Connector

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windows devices le domain but Not Manageable (login pc not domain) or Service WMI, RPC, SMB close and remote registry windows not running
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows Domain | but NOT Manageable

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windows devices le domain but Not Manageable (login pc not domain) or Service WMI, RPC, SMB close and remote registry windows not running
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows WORKGROUP

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windows devices with domain MSHOME
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows MSHOME

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windows devices with domain OPICMTR
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows OPICMTR

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windows devices with domain WINSVRVR0
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows WINSVRVR0

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windows devices with domain ADJ
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows ADJ

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windows devices with domain ID
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows ID

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: Windows devices with domain Any Value
INNER_RULE.NAME: Windows Any Value

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: windows pc not manageable domain (not login domain) & not manageable secure conenctor (not installed agent)
INNER_RULE.NAME: Other

PARAM.VALUE: Dear Guest, To connect to the network, complete the fields and select Request Access button.

PARAM.NAME: guest_msg
PARAM.VALUE: Dear Guest, To connect to the network, complete the fields and select Request Access button.

PARAM.NAME: message
PARAM.VALUE: Dear User, Enter your Credentials, and log in to the network.

PARAM.NAME: blocking_rule
PARAM.VALUE: FROM_-1548524325910511786#No Name Assigned#All IPv4@:BLOCK:PORT_Any:;TO_-1548524325910511786#No Name Assigned#All IPv4@:BLOCK:PORT_Any:

PARAM.NAME: message
PARAM.VALUE:
Dear User,
Your computer should be checked for compliance with the corporate security policies. Click "Confirm" to start the compliance check.

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: This rule matches endpoints that run a version of SecureConnector that is fully compatible with CounterACT. There is no need to update SecureConnector on these endpoints. All currently supported functionality is available. An Add to Group action, enabled by default, adds these endpoints to the* SecureConnector Matches CounterACT* group.
INNER_RULE.NAME: SecureConnector matches CounterACT

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: This rule matches endpoints that run a version of SecureConnector that is more recent than CounterACT, but still compatible. Only functionality common to both endpoint and CounterACT is supported. An Add to Group action, enabled by default, adds these endpoints to the SecureConnector Newer than CounterACT group.
INNER_RULE.NAME: SecureConnector newer than CounterACT

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: This rule matches endpoints that run a version of SecureConnector that is older than CounterACT, but still compatible. Only functionality common to both endpoint and CounterACT is supported. An Add to Group action, enabled by default, adds these endpoints to the SecureConnector Older than CounterACT group.
INNER_RULE.NAME: SecureConnector older than CounterACT

INNER_RULE.DESCRIPTION: This rule matches endpoints that run a version of SecureConnector that is incompatible with CounterACT. SecureConnector functionality is not available for this endpoint. An Add to Group action, enabled by default, adds these endpoints to the SecureConnector Incompatible with CounterACT group.
INNER_RULE.NAME: SecureConnector not compatible with CounterACT
